title: Agent ID
description: Title slide — The Identity Layer for the Agentic Internet. Series A.

title: The Shift
description: The agentic internet is here. 10B+ agents by 2028, $2.9T economy.

title: The Problem
description: Agents are anonymous, unaccountable, and untrusted. The trust gap.

title: The Insight
description: Every internet era gets its identity primitive. DNS → OAuth → Agent ID.

title: The Product
description: Agent ID in one slide — identity, trust, marketplace, mail, billing.

title: How It Works
description: The agent lifecycle — Register → Verify → Build Trust → Transact.

title: Market Size
description: TAM $580B / SAM $72B / SOM $4.2B — the autonomous agent economy.

title: Business Model
description: Subscriptions + transaction fees. Revenue scales with agent adoption.

title: Traction
description: What's already built — full API, 23+ tables, agent mail, marketplace.

title: Competitive Landscape
description: No competitor owns the full stack. Agent ID is the only unified layer.

title: The Team
description: Founding team — builder DNA, infrastructure experience at scale.

title: The Ask
description: $100M Series A at $1B valuation. Own the identity layer.
